description:
Re-creating Neuro-sama, a container of souls of AI waifu / virtual characters to bring them into our worlds.


New Contributors
- @mvanhorn made their first contribution in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/pull/1392
- @jim139129 made their first contribution in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/pull/1412
- @octo-patch made their first contribution in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/pull/1417
- @monolithic827 made their first contribution in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/pull/1302
🚀 Features
- Upgrade MiniMax default model to M2.7 - by @octo-patch in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/issues/1417 (8b91d)
- cap-vite:
  - Press R to re-run capacitor cli - by @LemonNekoGH (071e0)
- docs:
  - Add a simple web version guide - by @jim139129 in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/issues/1420 (43abf)
  - Sync download buttons and added SponsorKit - by @Neko-233 in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/issues/1407 (21dfb)
- stage-pages,stage-ui,i18n:
  - Disable auto trigger for chatcompletion check and use explict button - by @shinohara-rin and @nekomeowww in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/issues/1336 (623f3)
  - Add OpenRouter as a speech (TTS) provider - by @monolithic827 in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/issues/1302 (30354)
- stage-pocket:
  - Add Android target - by @lietblue and @LemonNekoGH in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/issues/1326 (f92db)
🐞 Bug Fixes
- cap-vite:
  - Don't auto restart when generated files update - by @LemonNekoGH (3c03a)
- ci:
  - Ignore generated Package.swift - by @LemonNekoGH (d11ed)
- docs:
  - Fix typo in landing page - by @qyl27 and @Garfield550 in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/issues/1399 (a5690)
  - Incorrect button link - by @qyl27 in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/issues/1411 (5a574)
- eslint:
  - Skip the symbolic link CLAUDE.md - by @sumimakito (c4646)
- llm:
  - Flatten content array for OpenAI-compatible providers - by @Reisenbug in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/issues/1222 (00890)
- pnpm:
  - Skip bundled postinstall script in simple-git-hooks - by @sumimakito (5f137)
  - Missing peerDeps for unplugin-vue-i18n - by @sumimakito (338df)
  - Add missing peerDeps for eslint - by @sumimakito (00666)
  - Add missing peerDeps for @huggingface/transformers - by @sumimakito (73d93)
  - Add missing peerDeps for stage-ui dependencies - by @sumimakito (4671c)
  - Add missing peerDep three for @pmndrs/pointer-events - by @sumimakito (e73cd)
- stage-pages:
  - Use placeholderLocalized from provider config for API key input - by @mvanhorn and Matt Van Horn in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/issues/1391 (09f24)
  - Prevent airi card dialogs from closing on outside click - by @Reisenbug in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/issues/1419 (848df)
- stage-pocket:
  - Fix template-compiler-options import and vite file serving allow list - by @sumimakito (7e4ea)
- stage-tamagotchi:
  - Import template-compiler-options from tresjs instead - by @sumimakito (a6b4f)
  - Mute the "request id is outside of Vite serving allow list" error - by @sumimakito (40434)
  - Harden caption overlay follow+mouse handling - by @Iro96 in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/issues/1402 (eb537)
  - Do not pause Live2D on visibility change (desktop switch) - by @Iro96 in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/issues/1410 (ea599)
- stage-ui:
  - Use nullish coalescing for errorMessageFrom fallback - by @Garfield550 and GitHub Copilot in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/issues/1370 (617c0)
  - Settings fallback route, and guard navigate back to home in tamagotchi - by @leaft in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/issues/1413 (2b7a7)
- stage-ui-live2d:
  - Animate model position and scale on resize with animejs - by @Reisenbug in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/issues/1395 (b97c7)
- stage-web:
  - Allow vite serving files outside of the allow list - by @sumimakito (38704)
View changes on GitHub
